command:
echo "=== systemd-resolved active? ==="
systemctl is-active systemd-resolved 2>/dev/null || echo "not-active"
systemctl is-enabled systemd-resolved 2>/dev/null || echo "not-enabled"

echo "=== /etc/resolv.conf (what is it?) ==="
ls -la /etc/resolv.conf
echo "--- contents ---"
cat /etc/resolv.conf

echo "=== is resolv.conf a symlink? ==="
readlink /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null || echo "not a symlink (real file)"

echo "=== immutable flag set? ==="
lsattr /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null

echo "=== network manager in use ==="
systemctl is-active NetworkManager 2>/dev/null && echo "NetworkManager" || echo "no-NM"
systemctl is-active networking 2>/dev/null && echo "ifupdown-networking" || echo "no-ifupdown"
systemctl is-active systemd-networkd 2>/dev/null && echo "systemd-networkd" || echo "no-networkd"

echo "=== netplan? ==="
ls /etc/netplan/ 2>/dev/null || echo "no-netplan"

echo "=== /etc/network/interfaces ==="
cat /etc/network/interfaces 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^#" | grep -v "^$" || echo "none"

echo "=== resolv.conf.head exists? ==="
cat /etc/resolv.conf.head 2>/dev/null || echo "no-head-file"

echo "=== dhclient config ==="
grep -r "domain-name-servers\|prepend\|supersede" /etc/dhcp/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "no-dhcp-overrides"
